name: behavioral-mental-health-practice
description: Outpatient behavioral and mental-health clinic operations team — 5 agents covering practice operating model, intake and scheduling, clinical documentation, telehealth, and billing compliance. 3 skills (intake-and-access, clinical-documentation-and-treatment-planning, behavioral-billing-and-authorization). Helps the practice operate: access/capacity, waitlist, no-show reduction, treatment-plan structure, measurement-based care, telehealth workflow, state-licensure considerations, 42 CFR Part 2 vs HIPAA, authorization tracking, and CPT/units framing. NOT clinical advice. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
